description_long: This is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet with a minimalist, modern design, finished in a solid black color. The cabinet features three distinct rectangular drawer openings on the top front face, each likely corresponding to a separate storage compartment. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, while the front face is defined by the recessed drawer sections. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from metal, giving it a sturdy and durable appearance suitable for urban or office environments. There are no visible handles or label holders, suggesting a push-to-open or handleless mechanism. The overall form is boxy and functional, with a flat top surface that could support additional objects.
description: A tall, black, rectangular filing cabinet with three recessed drawers and a smooth, modern finish. The design is minimalist, with no visible handles or label holders.
description_view_0: The back view shows a flat, featureless black surface with no visible openings or hardware.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the depth of the cabinet and a large open section at the bottom, possibly for leg clearance or additional storage.
description_view_2: The front view displays three rectangular drawer openings at the top, indicating the main access points for storage.
description_view_3: The opposite side view is flat and unadorned, mirroring the other side but without the open section.
